    Enum FileFormat

    One of supported CAD file formats.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [ComVisible(false)]
public enum FileFormat : ulong

    Apng

    The Apng file format.

    Bmp

    Bmp file format.

    CF2

    The CF2 file format

    CGM
